title: aphelia gunnii
intro: Aphelia gunnii, also known as the silver bush or sea pink, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the coastal regions of the Mediterranean. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aphelia gunnii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Aphelia gunnii often involve infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in teas, salves, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
